rationale: No direct conflict. §29.3611 governs enrollment allotments for children leaving a program; it does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraised values. The proposed Tax Code change does not alter this statute's operative mechanism.
quote: the district or school is entitled to receive, in addition to other funding to which the district or school is entitled to receive for the child, an allotment in an amount equal to the basic allotment multiplied by 0.1
_note: No textual or operational conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this enrollment allotment provision.
